headline: AI Biometric Recognition: Fingerprint, Iris, Face, and Multimodal Deep Learning Systems
description: AI has transformed biometric recognition from specialized hardware systems to software running on smartphones. Face recognition (Face ID), fingerprint sensors, and iris scanners use deep learning to achieve forensic-grade identity verification. Multimodal systems combining multiple biometrics now reach near-perfect accuracy.

citation.name: Biometrics recognition using deep learning: a survey (150+ papers)
A multi-modal biometric recognition system based on fingerprints, iris, and facial recognition
